meta.title: Immigration + AI Talent
meta.description:
Andrew Ng on why welcoming immigrants has been essential to building strong AI communities, and why attracting global talent still matters for the future of AI.

These are the conversations we continue at AI Dev.

Join us at AI Dev 26 × San Francisco, April 28–29. Tickets available: https://bit.ly/4aiyfNp
